ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the patient is participating in */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_administrations" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug administration */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the drug was administered in */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the drug */,
  "administration_time" REAL /* Time at which the drug was administered */,
  "route_of_administration" TEXT /* Route of administration of the drug */,
  "dosing_frequency" TEXT /* Dosing frequency of the drug */,
  "dosing_duration" REAL /* Dosing duration of the drug */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the drug administration data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_administrations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_administrations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pkpd_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the parameter was calculated for */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the parameter was calculated for */,
  "parm_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., elimination half-life, absorption rate) */,
  "parm_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the parameter data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pkpd_parameters_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pkpd_parameters_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentration_data" (
  "conc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration measurement */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the measurement was taken from */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the measurement was taken from */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the drug at the specified time */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the concentration data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concentration_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concentration_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_data" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage measurement */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the measurement was taken from */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the measurement was taken from */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the drug at the specified time */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dosage data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosage_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosage_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effect_data" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect measurement */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the measurement was taken from */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the measurement was taken from */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "effect" REAL /* Effect of the drug at the specified time */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the effect data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the outcome is for */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the trial (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_outcomes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_log" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
